title: Scripts for modeling chemical ligation of DNA junctions within biomolecular crystals
author: Ward, Abigail R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A collection of Python scripts, gel images, and other ancillary files used to model the chemical ligation of DNA junctions inside a biomolecular crystal.
steps_raw: A collection of Python scripts, gel images, and other ancillary files used to model the chemical ligation of DNA junctions inside a biomolecular crystal.
